args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS average_rating, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(review_id) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS average_rating, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(review_id) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC LIMIT 1;

result.preview: [{"description": "Located at 501 Fairmount Ave in Philadelphia, PA, this inviting establishment offers a delightful menu featuring Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes, perfect for a cozy meal any time of the day."}]

"The business with the highest average rating (4.0) between January 1, 2016, and June 30, 2016, with at least 5 reviews, is businessref_9. It belongs to the categories Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), and Cafes."
